variants.title: HiFi Filter SAVI 0302MH002 Cover Screw
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAVI 0302MH002 Cover Screw. Easy to install and replace, the SAVI 0302MH002 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: COVER SCREW, Dimension 1 (D1): 49.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 22.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): M10X1,5, Height 1 (H1): 103.5 mm, Height 2 (H2): 72.0 mm
